prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `0a2355a6`.
codex_response:
`0a2355a6` recolors each connected cyan object by its number of enclosed black holes while leaving geometry and position unchanged: `1 -> 1`, `2 -> 3`, `3 -> 2`, `4 -> 4`. I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint because it matched the official examples; `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry for this task.

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0a2355a6/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0a2355a6/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0a2355a6/generator.py), and [helpers.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0a2355a6/helpers.py). The verifier passed all official examples with `pass 0a2355a6: 5/5 official examples passed`. No new shared primitive was needed in `arc2/dsl_ext.py`.

The generator matches the family by sampling 3-4 compact ring-like motifs with 1-4 holes from an official-style motif bank, applying reflections/diagonal mirrors, and packing them into tight two-row layouts before cropping. I built 1000 verified examples at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0a2355a6/task.json), with per-example JSONs under [examples](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0a2355a6/examples), and preview sheets at [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0a2355a6/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0a2355a6/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0a2355a6/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0a2355a6/previews/preview_03.png).
